@echo off

    $authInfo = '%auth%'; ^
    $authBytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes($authInfo); ^
    $authHeader = [Convert]::ToBase64String($authBytes); ^
    $headers = @{ Authorization = 'Basic ' + $authHeader; ContentType = 'application/json' }; ^
    $body = Get-Content -Path 'D:\01_WorkArea\zhengding-lingxing-microservice\confluence-body.json' -Raw; ^
